title: Cobblemon Mixed Dimensions
description: Dimensions joined to bring exciting new fakemon! In this datapack there are fakemon based of games, anime or original designs. There are also plenty of unique moves and abilities to play around with!
body:
In this Datapack i add pokemon based off Overwatch, Jujutsu Kaisen, League of Legends or other. Some are serious, some are for fun but i made all of them have their own flavor and feel unique. 

To ask questions, leave suggestions or report bugs hit me up on [Discord](https://discord.com/users/422362779349942274)!

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_🔥CREDITS🔥:_

_🔥[RENELLABSOL](https://discord.com/users/717477230007287950)🔥: Made AnglerWashi's model._

_🔥[TALONBOT](https://discord.com/users/310817370610466817)🔥: Made Porygon-X and Sansinja's model._

_🔥[DIANAMOND](https://discord.com/users/134771889762467840)🔥: Made [Iron Wyvern](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IO-F-1wb3umpspZeZZ-VuCATz5glNKygP6ag3lEhDCM/edit?tab=t.0)._

_🔥[ABrickToTheHead](https://discord.com/users/343509343037161473)🔥: Made Curstoise's model._

_🔥[A WIRALON PRIME](https://discord.com/users/589694528277970954)🔥: Provided Iron Oracle's [reference art](https://toyhou.se/Wiral_the_jester/characters/folder:6957388), design and move pool._

_🔥[COOLREX](https://discord.com/users/266819093573664768)🔥: Contributed Lycanroc's model from her [Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coolrexs-cobblemon-collection) as a base for Naafiroc._

_🔥[BLAZEHYDROXIDE](https://discord.com/users/215552945687756800)🔥: Contributed Medicham's model from his [Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hydro-reanimodel-pack#download) as a base for Kaymon._


**!!For any use outside of the datapack, ask for permission directly from the creators!!**

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**📝HOW TO INSTALL📝**

To install the pack then instert GojoData into your datapack folder, the world's datapack folder and the resource pack folder. 

**ENJOY**

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Pokemon:

**_All the details about these Pokemon are in this spreadsheet:                 
✦︎[Custom Showdown](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1JFiXY9LV-Ql3wIQPt5mlLLRjIjA8SIufq0urTCkfKy0/edit?usp=sharing)✦︎_**                              

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**⚔️Overwatch based Pokemon⚔️:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Tinkahard: Tinkaton + Reinhardt

Cyber (these pokemon are based off Genji from Overwatch, each following a +20 base stat rule and each getting at least 1 unique move):

Cyber Claw: Made from Sneasler

Cyber Saw: Made from Ceruledge

Cyber Blade: Made from Escavalier

Cyber Fly: Made from Ninjask

Cyber Fin: Made from Dondozo

Cyber Ninja: Made from Greninja

Cyber Crozma: Cyber evolution of Crozma

Cyber Adapter: Cyber form of Goluraga

</details>



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**🔵Jujutsu Kaisen Pokemon🔴:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Gojinja: Gojo + Greninja (Legendary)

Machuna: Sukuna + Machamp (Legendary)

Spirikatomb: Rika + Spiritomb (Legendary)

Goluraga: Mahoraga + Golem (Mythical)

Hitmontoji: Toji + Hitmonlee

Yuchoji: Yuji + Machoke (Preevo: Yuchop)

Grimnami: Grimmsnarl + Hanami (Psuedo. Preevos: 1st stage - Rootidimp, 2nd stage - Hangrem) 

</details>



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**👊League Of Legens Pokemon👊:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Yasone: Made from Charcadet, Pre evo of Yasone and Yonade

Yasuark: Yasuo + Zoroark

Yonade: Yone + Mega Gallade

Kaymon: Kayn + Medicham

Kaynimon: Shadow Assasin Kayn + Medicham

Rhaasmon: Rhaast + Medicham

Rhaayn: ???

Revenape: Underwold Wukong + Infernape

Naafiroc: Naafiri + Lycanroc

Divine Justice: Kayle + Gardevoir (Past Paradox)

</details>



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**💎Other Pokemon💎:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Regibalance: New Yin & Yang themed Regi (Legendary)

AnglerWashi: Mutated Wishiwashi School (Mythical)

Chilly Bane: Past Paradox form of Salazzle (Paradox)

Mighty Arms: Past Paradox form of Swampert (Paradox)

Iron Wyvern: Future Paradox form of Noivern (Paradox)

Iron Oracle: Future Paradox form of Absol (Paradox)

Pheru: Beru from Solo Leveling made from Pheramosa (Ultra Beast)

Pegasdale: Ground Fairy form of Mudsdale (Preevo: Unibray)

Ultra Greninja: Ultra Form of Greninja

Ultra Crozma: Basiclly Ultra Necrozma

Crozma: Preevo of Ultra Crozma and Cyber Crozma

Zorkarun: Based off Okarun from Dandadan

Porygon-X: Alt evolution of Porygon 2

Mawor: Dragon evolution of Scyther

Cyber Hunter: Made from Accelgor

McBoom: McDonalds worker Rillaboom

Noxivine: Poisoned Greninja

Curstoise: Ghostly Blastoise

Hydropult: Water form of Dragapult

Sansinja: Shedinja + Sans

</details>



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**FOR USE ON PUBLIC SERVERS, PERMISSION MUST BE OBTAINED DIRECTLY FROM THE CREATOR**
